description_long: This apartment building features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a combination of dark gray and brown brick exterior walls. The front facade is characterized by two stacked balconies on each side, enclosed with white railings, and a central entrance at ground level. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged across all visible sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The uppermost floor is set back, creating a terrace-like perimeter around the top level. The building's clean lines and minimal ornamentation reflect a contemporary architectural style. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from brick, concrete, and glass, with metal railings accenting the balconies.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with brown brick walls, large windows, and white-railed balconies on the front. The top floor is recessed, forming a terrace around the upper level.
description_view_0: Front view showing two stacked balconies on each side, a central entrance, and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the balconies and the flat, dark roof with the recessed upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view with no balconies, featuring a symmetrical arrangement of windows and the terrace-like upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's brick facade, window placement, and the setback of the top floor.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, evenly spaced across each facade, with consistent alignment between floors.
